rationale: The cited paper appears methodologically foundational: it develops noncontractual CLV modeling (Pareto/NBD + gamma-gamma, discounted expected transactions), while the citing paper’s core framework also models noncontractual repeat purchasing/churn and spend for valuation. Given this strong construct/method overlap in the notes (not just topical similarity) and a confirmed DOI-level reference match, this pair is not an obvious incidental mention.
